title: Day 22 Reflection
description: Honest post-interview assessment — what held up under pressure and what needs one more rep before Day 23.

prompts.question: Did you finish the Kanban Board in 90 minutes? If not, where did time go — planning, API, styling, or debugging?
prompts.guidance: Interviewers care about time management as much as completeness.

prompts.question: Which debugging scenario was hardest — infinite render, mutation, deps, keys, API, or routing? Walk through your diagnosis.
prompts.guidance: Name the tool you used: DevTools, console, ESLint.

prompts.question: Rate your code review findings: what would a senior engineer flag in your submission?
prompts.guidance: Cover folder structure, naming, performance, accessibility, or reusability.

prompts.question: Of the 20 interview questions, which three made you hesitate? Why?
prompts.guidance: Identify gaps to target before mock interview on Day 24.

prompts.question: How did you communicate your approach during the machine coding round? What would you say differently next time?
prompts.guidance: Interview week tests communication, not only code.
